name: odoo-semantic-mcp
description: MCP server connection for Odoo Semantic — semantic code intelligence (inheritance chains, field impact, model inspect, ORM validation) over HTTP. Set API key + server URL via /odoo-semantic-mcp:connect.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Odoo Semantic API key (starts with osm_). Get one from your server admin or https://odoo-semantic.viindoo.com/install/. If Claude Code does not prompt for this value during install (known v2.1.x bug — github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/39455), run /odoo-semantic-mcp:connect after install instead.

mcp_url.title: MCP Server URL
mcp_url.description: Base URL of your Odoo Semantic MCP server
